title: I love hot biomes
description: Makes Minecraft generate only biomes that can spawn with highest temperature
body:
This datapack makes Minecraft generate biomes as if temperature was the highest everywhere in the world.
Biomes weren't chosen manually, these are the biomes Minecraft generates when temperature is the highest.


<details>
<summary>List of biomes that can spawn in this world</summary>

### Ocean biomes
Mushroom Fields, Warm Ocean
### Coast biomes
Stony Shore
### River biomes
River
### Regular biomes
Windswept Savanna, Desert, Eroded Badlands, Badlands, Wooded Badlands, Mangrove Swamp
### Cave biomes
Lush Caves, Dripstone Caves, Deep Dark

</details>
